data.current_summary: Find stores offering last mile delivery near an address
data.summary_suggestion: Find stores offering last mile delivery
data.description_suggestion: Searches for Instacart Connect partner stores that offer last mile delivery services near a specified address. Accepts a location (address or coordinates) as input and returns a list of available stores with their details including store ID, name, and location. Use this operation to identify which stores can fulfill delivery requests for a given customer address.
data.reasoning: Original summary is adequate but description is completely missing. Added explanation of what the operation does, what inputs it expects (location), what it returns (store list with details), and when an AI agent should use it. Included domain context about 'Instacart Connect partner stores' for clarity.

message: Operation 'validateAddressAndCreateUser' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description is missing entirely. Added details about what the operation does (creates user + validates address), expected inputs (customer info and address), outputs (user object with ID and validation status), and side effects (establishes customer record for future orders). Clarified that address validation confirms deliverability.

data.current_summary: Create a Connect user account and validate the customer's address
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new Connect user account and validates the provided customer address in a single operation. Accepts customer information and address details as input. Returns the created user object with a user ID and validation status indicating whether the address is deliverable. This operation establishes the customer record needed for subsequent order creation and address validation ensures the location can receive last mile delivery.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description is missing entirely. Added details about what the operation does (creates user + validates address), expected inputs (customer info and address), outputs (user object with ID and validation status), and side effects (establishes customer record for future orders). data.description_suggestion: Retrieves available delivery time slots (service options) for a specified store and address combination. Accepts store ID, address, and other delivery parameters as input. Returns a list of ServiceOption objects containing time windows, delivery fees, and availability status. Use this operation after finding a store to present delivery time choices to the customer before order creation.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear but description is missing. message: Operation 'reserveTimeSlot' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary mentions '10 minutes' which is implementation detail rather than action description. Description is missing entirely. Improved summary to focus on the action (reserve time slot). Added description explaining the operation's purpose (holds slot for 10 minutes), required parameters (user ID, service option ID), return value (confirmation with ID and expiration), and side effects (locks slot, prevents double-booking). Clarified workflow dependency with order creation.

data.current_summary: Reserve a delivery time slot for 10 minutes
data.description_suggestion: Reserves a specific delivery time slot for a Connect user, holding it for 10 minutes to allow order completion. Requires the user ID and service option ID as path parameters. Returns a reservation confirmation with reservation ID and expiration timestamp. This operation locks the time slot to prevent double-booking and must be called before creating the order to ensure the selected time window remains available.
data.reasoning: Summary mentions '10 minutes' which is implementation detail rather than action description. Description is missing entirely. Improved summary to focus on the action (reserve time slot). Added description explaining the operation's purpose (holds slot for 10 minutes), required parameters (user ID, service option ID), return value (confirmation with ID and expiration), and side effects (locks slot, prevents double-booking). Clarified workflow dependency with order creation.

message: Operation 'createOrder' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description is missing entirely. Added details about required parameters (user ID path parameter, order details in request body), what the operation returns (order ID, status, delivery time, confirmation), side effects (triggers fulfillment workflow), and workflow dependency (requires prior time slot reservation). data.current_summary: Create a last mile delivery order
data.description_suggestion: Creates a last mile delivery order for a Connect user with a reserved time slot. Requires user ID as a path parameter and comprehensive order details including items, delivery address, reserved service option ID, and customer information. Returns a CreateOrderResponse containing the order ID, status, estimated delivery time, and order confirmation details. This operation finalizes the delivery request and triggers fulfillment workflow. A time slot must be reserved before calling this operation.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description is missing entirely.
